title: chamaecytisus × millenii
intro: Chamaecytisus × millenii, also known as the 'Millenii Spine', is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the French broom (Cytisus purpureus) and the red broom (Genista tinctoria). It has been found to possess medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues and skin conditions. Chamaecytisus × millenii can be prepared as herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
